name: Onion Bits
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut small rounds (1½" to 2 inches in diameter) from white bread.
2. Spread mayonnaise (not salad dressing) 1/4 inch thick on the top side of each bread round.
3. Place a paper-thin onion slice about the same diameter as the bread on each mayo-coated side.
4. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese liberally over the onions.
5. Broil until golden brown for 2-3 minutes.
6. Best prepared early in the day and refrigerated until ready to broil.
7. Serve hot as an hors d'oeuvre or with soup.
